name: Reducto
description: An agentic document processing platform that provides APIs for parsing, classifying, and extracting data from complex documents using OCR and vision-language models.
notes: Reducto is designed explicitly as a developer-first platform; while a specific MCP server is not currently listed in public registries, its REST API is highly compatible with agentic tool calling architectures. [human-verified: Free trial credits on signup. No credit card required. Instant API key at app.reducto.ai.]
